title: Character Attributes
text: Character Attributes This property determines whether buttons for character attributes (bold, italics, and underline) are displayed when the panel is used as a session panel. Valid values are True or False . Description The character attributes buttons are only displayed if the panel is used as a session panel for the application shell. They do not appear on a pop-up panel or a form panel. You can define language-specific texts for character attribute buttons by defining Toggle Symbol language setups. For more information, see Define Toggle Symbols . Applies To Panels Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
